hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -Eq 'rm -rf|rm -fr|:>|mkfs|dd if='; then echo 'BLOCKED: destructive command' >&2; exit 2; fi
cmake --build build 2>/dev/null && ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure 2>/dev/null || echo 'NOTE: build/tests not green at stop; verify before declaring done.' >&2
